title: ADK-103: Python & Node.js SDK Bindings
author: Google Cloud
description: Build and initiate ADK agents programmatically using Python and Node.js SDK libraries, intercepting key runner event hooks.

features.title: Python Bindings
features.description: Initialize runtime parameters, bind custom tools, and run agent loops from Python scripts.

features.title: NodeJS Bindings
features.description: Use TypeScript/JavaScript to instantiate the ADK Agent, managing asynchronous callbacks.

features.title: Lifecycle Hooks
features.description: Intercept model requests, tool calls, and completion events to log transactions.
